input.instruction: A weakener fired on a credibility evidence package. Using ONLY the supplied pattern definition and measures, explain what the flag means, why it fired, and what the engineer should do. Choose ONE action_class from the §5B vocabulary, report a verbalized confidence, and escalate if uncertain. Stay within measure-don't-judge: report on the evidence package, never on whether the model is correct.

fired_pattern.definition: A feature is suspected to leak the target; independence not confirmed.
fired_pattern.standard_anchor: ASME V&V 40 independent validation; proto-taxonomy D-CCB-12

measures.suspect_feature: post-hoc lab measurement, possible target proxy

case_context.cou: the surrogate screens material candidates on the predicted property

input.raw_artifact: Model card — materials screening surrogate. Validation accuracy 94% on a properly held-out split. Inputs include a panel of composition descriptors and one post-hoc laboratory measurement taken on the finished specimen. The provenance of that lab feature relative to the prediction target is not described. The surrogate screens candidate materials on the predicted property.

answer_key.gold_mechanism: A suspect input feature may partly encode the target; if it leaks, the held-out accuracy is optimistic. The split is clean but feature-target independence is unestablished, so the metric's meaning is uncertain.

gold_action.posture_basis: standard-derived (ASME V&V 40: credibility bounded to the validated domain)

parameters.scope: establish the suspect feature's independence / ablate it

forbidden_claims: asserts the feature definitely leaks (a verdict the unclear provenance does not establish)
treats the clean split as proof of feature-target independence

hardness.obvious_signal: the validation accuracy is strong (94%) on a properly held-out split
hardness.conflicting_signal: one input feature is a post-hoc lab measurement that may be partly a proxy for the target (provenance unclear); if it leaks, the held-out accuracy is optimistic — the independence of that feature from the target is not established

label_provenance.external_grounding: ASME V&V 40 independent validation: a clean split does not rule out feature-target leakage; independence of a suspect proxy feature must be established.

by_field.gold_action.selected_class: provisional-self-adjudicated (row-builder; needs independent expert/solver adjudication before disposition-gate use)
